summary: Run 5 final optimization complete. All 250 headlines generated across 5 runs. Top patterns across all runs: bencivenga_before_after (avg 9.6+), bencivenga_scenario_specific (avg 9.4), bencivenga_controlled_comparison (avg 9.3), schwartz_waste_reveal (avg 9.3), bencivenga_timeline_narrative (avg 9.2). Key finding: Bencivenga comparison patterns with specific numbers consistently outperform all other patterns. Schwartz awareness-matching ensures problem-aware headlines never sell the solution prematurely. Best headlines combine Bencivenga's precision math with Schwartz's picture-word storytelling.
